title: Natural Uranium
description: This mod adds uranium to minecraft
body:
**This mod adds uranium to Minecraft which can be found naturally generated in caves.**

_Uranium_ can be used to make _Uranium Swords_ which gives a _High Radiation_ status effect to the targetthe high radiation effect
 
_High Radiation_ makes the entity take damage (~ 2+ hearts) every ~2 seconds,as well as damaging the item that the entity holds if it has a durability.

**_High Radiation_ can be applied if an entity holds a uranium,the effect stays for about 5 seconds**
